objective: Triage FORGE-BUG-007 — reproduce, locate, decide route.
key_changes: Confirmed the reported bug where --count is ignored when combined with --formal.
Isolated the root cause to conditional branch in hello.py lines 17-21 bypassing the count loop.
Assessed Path A / Path B eligibility criteria, finding all criteria are met for Path A.
Decided on Route A for immediate plan-free bug-fixing.
findings: Root cause: Formal greeting branch prints directly once and bypasses the loop in hello.py.
Reproduction: Running 'python3 hello.py Alice --formal --count 3' prints only 1 line.
Rationale: The fix is minor, self-contained in a single file, and has a trivial regression test.
